name: Chocolate Filled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow eggs to reach room temperature, then wash and gently shake each one.
2. Using a sharp knife, carefully remove a small piece of shell from one end and make a small puncture in the other end.
3. Gently blow through the small hole to remove the yolks and whites into separate containers.
4. Rinse the empty shells with water and let them dry completely.
5. Place the clean eggshells, large side up, in an empty egg carton.
6. Cut the chocolate into small pieces.
7. Heat the heavy cream in a saucepan until it reaches boiling point, then remove from heat.
8. Add the chopped chocolate to the hot cream and whisk until melted and well combined.
9. Stir in the butter and hazelnut chocolate spread until fully blended.
10. Using a small funnel, carefully fill each eggshell with the warm filling while still warm.
11. Refrigerate the filled eggs until ready to serve.
12. Serve the filled eggs in egg cups.
This recipe is from Salt and Pepper Publications "Chocolate The French Way."
